lead.full_text: Angry about Obamacare? I don't blame you! Every morning's newspaper brings a new outrage from the 2,572 pages of the Affordable Care Act. Commonly known as Obamacare, this is the legislation about which Nancy Pelosi once said: 'We have to pass the bill to find out what's in it.' Well, we passed it. And now, at last, we're finding out what's really in it: The 20 new taxes and tax increases. The trillion dollars added to our debt. The battalion of new IRS investigators hired to enforce it. The 175,000 'navigators' who will go door-to-door threatening... er, encouraging you to sign up. But before you get angry all over again, I've got some valuable advice for you: Don't get mad. Get RICH!

lead.transition_to_body: Because even though I believe Obamacare will have a disastrous effect on the American economy...
lead.emotional_progression: anger validation → outrage amplification → disruption → greed

root_symptom_fantasy.root: Obamacare FORCES money to flow in specific directions: (1) Forces companies to convert full-time workers to part-time (30 hours) to avoid insurance costs - making them MORE profitable, (2) Forces government to become 'world's biggest pusher of vaccines' ($115B to pharma), (3) Forces 32 million uninsured into system as new customers. mechanism.mechanism_name: The Money Map Method (Follow the Money)
mechanism.mechanism_description: Track enormous sums of government spending, central bank cash, and forced private investment wherever they flow around the world. Position BEFORE the money arrives. When government FORCES money into specific industries (like Obamacare forcing 32M customers to pharma and forcing companies to cut worker hours), you profit from the inevitable result.
mechanism.how_it_works_simple: Government forces money to flow in specific directions. We identify WHERE government is forcing money to go BEFORE it gets there. We position you in companies that MUST benefit from that forced flow. Your portfolio grows as the forced money arrives.
how_it_works_detailed: Identify major government mandates that FORCE money to move (like Obamacare's 32M new insurance customers)
Calculate the total money flow ($115 billion to pharma over 10 years)
Find companies positioned at the END of that money pipeline (vaccine makers, fast food chains forced to cut hours)
Recognize COUNTERINTUITIVE effects Wall Street misses (Obamacare making McDonald's MORE profitable by forcing part-time conversion)
Read the actual legislation (all 2,572 pages) to find hidden provisions (two paragraphs on vaccine promotion)
Position BEFORE obvious (McDonald's stock is flat because Wall Street doesn't see this yet)
Use 50-40-10 allocation: 50% Base Builders (safety), 40% Growth & Income (dividends), 10% Rocket Riders (explosive growth)
Follow money globally (3 billion people entering economy want burgers, toothpaste, cellphones)
Capitalize on 'colossal shifts in social, political, and economic power'
Track not just WHERE money flows but WHO is forced to receive it
mechanism.mechanism_metaphor: Like a financial GPS that shows you where tidal waves of government money are about to hit - so you position your 'umbrella turned upside down' to catch the falling cash before others even know it's raining
mechanism.mechanism_villain: Politicians and central bankers with 'bird-brained fiscal policies' + Greedy Wall Street manipulators + Small-minded politicians with only answer of MORE SPENDING + Mainstream analysts who miss counterintuitive opportunities
mechanism_uniqueness: READS actual legislation (all 2,572 pages) to find hidden money flows others miss
Identifies COUNTERINTUITIVE profit opportunities (companies that benefit when everyone thinks they're hurt)
Tracks FORCED money flows not voluntary market movements
Global scope - follows money worldwide not just US
50-40-10 allocation proven to outperform (270% vs S&P 10.7% over 12 years)
Dr. Betsy McCaughey actually READ entire Affordable Care Act (only person who did)
Keith Fitz-Gerald travels globe as 'Indiana Jones of Investing' to see opportunities firsthand
mechanism.why_you_never_heard: Wall Street makes money keeping you in traditional investments. If you knew you could systematically profit from government disasters by following forced money flows, you'd stop following their advice and start following the money yourself.

enemy_construction.primary_enemy: Obamacare (the law itself) + Politicians who passed it + IRS enforcement
enemy_construction.enemy_introduction: Every morning's newspaper brings a new outrage from the 2,572 pages of the Affordable Care Act. Nancy Pelosi said: 'We have to pass the bill to find out what's in it.' Well, we passed it. And now we're finding out what's really in it.
enemy_characteristics: 2,572 pages of government gobbledygook that nobody read before passing
20 new taxes and tax increases (largest tax increase in US history)
Trillion dollars added to our debt
Battalion of new IRS investigators ($500 million for enforcement)
175,000 'navigators' going door-to-door threatening people to sign up
Premiums could DOUBLE or even TRIPLE (IRS says cheapest will be $20,000/year for family)
Turns full-time workers into part-time workers (30 hours to avoid mandate)
Disappearing doctors (average wait time 33 days → 55 days in Massachusetts)
Takes half TRILLION from Medicare to pay for Obamacare
Can turn honest Americans into criminals if they don't buy insurance
Forces you to buy something you don't want
enemy_construction.enemy_motivation: Government grows power by forcing compliance and extracting wealth through taxation and mandates. Obamacare is massive power grab disguised as healthcare reform.
damage_enemy_causes: Your health insurance premiums doubling or tripling
You'll wait longer to see doctors (55 days in MA)
Unemployment rising as companies cut hours to avoid mandate
Your paycheck getting cut (40 hours → 30 hours)
Doctors disappearing (some bankrupt, some retire, bright people avoid medical school)
Individual liberty destroyed (forced to buy product)
You become criminal if you don't comply
enemy_construction.why_enemy_wins: Because Obamacare passed Congress and Supreme Court. It's the law of the land. Chances of repeal are 'somewhere between zero and none.' The enemy has already won politically - you can't fight it, only profit from it.
visceral_hatred_triggers: Nancy Pelosi: 'We have to pass the bill to find out what's in it'
Chief Justice Roberts voted to let largest tax increase in history happen
IRS gets $500 million to frighten and force you to pay
175,000 navigators going door-to-door 'threatening... er, encouraging' you
Congress tried to weasel out with waivers for themselves immediately after passing it
Obama's advice to elderly: 'Maybe you'd be better off not having surgery and taking painkiller instead'
Prisoners are EXEMPT from Obamacare - lucky them!

primary_objections.reframe: Obamacare has passed Congress and Supreme Court. Chances of repeal are between zero and none. Fighting politically = zero financial gain. Following money = portfolio growth. Making money is the best revenge.

You couldn't know what you weren't told.
